text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Moderator role. We're thrilled to have you on the team — feel free to introduce yourself and reach out if you have any questions!

Welcome to the community, guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Event Helper role. We're excited to have you helping out with events — feel free to introduce yourself and ask if you need anything!

Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been granted the Mentor role. We're so glad to have your expertise here — feel free to introduce yourself and don't hesitate to reach out with any questions!
